//: Fleet hooks. Loaded only by fleet sessions via `claude --settings scripts/fleet/hooks.settings.json` (worker-new / orch-start / worker-open), so ordinary Claude sessions in this repo are unaffected. Both hook commands are inert unless $UNSEAMLESS_FLEET_SESSION is set. $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR resolves to each session's own workspace, so a worker runs its own copy. _hook is the message TRANSPORT (drains the inbox into the model's context, stamps busy/idle); _ux is the user-facing VISIBILITY layer (renders user-only `systemMessage` notices for fleet sends/receives/waits/lifecycle, never seen by the model). See scripts/fleet/_hook, scripts/fleet/_ux, and docs/ORCHESTRATION.md.
